# The Flight Centre Travel & Tours — Full Knowledge Base

## Overview

The Flight Centre Travel & Tours is an IATA-certified travel agency headquartered in Gujranwala, Pakistan. The company operates from two offices in Gujranwala and provides full-service travel coordination including Umrah packages, international tour packages, airline ticket booking, hotel reservations, visit visa documentation, travel insurance, Saudi wakala, and work visa services.

The business has operated for more than 20 years (as of 2026). It serves clients across Pakistan and arranges travel to over 50 international destinations.

## Contact

- **Primary phone (UAN)**: 111-786-788
- **Direct line**: +92 304 111 9786
- **Secondary line**: +92 300 862 3818
- **Main office phone**: +92 55 37 30 255 / 256
- **Branch office phone**: +92 55 378 3054 / 3055
- **Email**: info@tfctours.com.pk
- **CEO**: Rana Khalid Parvez Khan

## Locations

### Main Office
Office 36-37, Jinnah Stadium, Gujranwala, Punjab 52250, Pakistan.
Phone: +92 55 37 30 255/56.

### Branch Office
Plaza 18, Neelum Block, DC Colony, Gujranwala, Pakistan.
Phone: +92 55 378 3054-55.

### Coordinates
32.1617° N, 74.1883° E.

### Business hours
Monday–Saturday, 09:00–21:00 PKT. Sunday closed (excluding 24/7 phone helpdesk).

## Services in Detail

### Umrah Packages
The Flight Centre Travel & Tours offers comprehensive Umrah packages designed to provide a spiritually fulfilling and entirely hassle-free pilgrimage for our clients. We offer standard packages available in 15-day, 21-day, and 28-day variants, but all itineraries can be customised to meet specific duration or budgetary requirements. 

Every Umrah package encompasses a full suite of services, including:
- **Accommodation:** Premium hotel bookings situated in close proximity to the Haram in both Makkah and Madinah, ranging from budget-friendly 3-star properties to luxurious 5-star hotels offering Haram-view rooms.
- **Flights:** Return air tickets on top-tier airlines such as Saudia, PIA, Emirates, and Qatar Airways, with direct flights and flexible routing options available.
- **Visa Processing:** End-to-end Umrah visa processing and facilitation, ensuring rapid approvals and compliance with all Saudi Ministry of Hajj and Umrah regulations.
- **Transport:** Private or shared ground transportation using modern, air-conditioned vehicles for travel between Jeddah/Madinah airports, Makkah, and Madinah.
- **Ziyarat:** Guided visits to deeply significant historical Islamic sites in both Makkah (e.g., Jabal al-Nour, Mina, Arafat) and Madinah (e.g., Quba Mosque, Mount Uhud, Masjid al-Qiblatayn).
- **Support:** 24/7 dedicated customer support accessible via our UAN before, during, and after the journey to address any urgent needs or itinerary changes.

### Tour Packages
Our bespoke international tour packages are expertly crafted to cater to a diverse array of travel styles, including family holidays, romantic honeymoon getaways, corporate incentive trips, and adventure travel. We operate structured group departures as well as fully customizable private itineraries.

Our portfolio encompasses over 40 distinct international destinations, prominently featuring:
- **Middle East:** Dubai and Abu Dhabi (UAE), Muscat and Salalah (Oman), Bahrain, and Doha (Qatar).
- **Southeast Asia:** Malaysia (Kuala Lumpur, Langkawi, Penang), Thailand (Bangkok, Phuket, Pattaya, Chiang Mai), Singapore, and Cambodia (Siem Reap, Phnom Penh).
- **South & Central Asia:** Sri Lanka (Colombo, Kandy, Galle), Iran (Mashhad, Tehran, Isfahan), and Azerbaijan (Baku).
- **Far East & Beyond:** Indonesia (Bali, Jakarta), Maldives, and Turkey (Istanbul, Cappadocia, Antalya).

Each tour package can encompass selected hotel accommodations, daily breakfast or full board meal plans, dedicated airport transfers, and expertly guided excursions to major tourist attractions and cultural landmarks.

### Airline Ticket Booking
As an IATA-certified travel agency, we hold direct ticketing authority for all major domestic and international airlines, ensuring that our clients receive the most competitive fares, optimal routings, and immediate ticketing confirmation. 

- **Domestic Carriers:** Pakistan International Airlines (PIA), Airblue, Serene Air, and Air Sial, offering comprehensive coverage of routes connecting Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Quetta, and Peshawar.
- **International Carriers:** Emirates, Qatar Airways, Etihad Airways, Turkish Airlines, Saudia, Gulf Air, Oman Air, FlyDubai, AirArabia, Kuwait Airways, and many more.

Clients can secure their bookings through our dedicated online portal at theflightcentre.pk, or by contacting our 24/7 helpdesk or visiting either of our physical branches in Gujranwala. We handle complex multi-city itineraries, group bookings, special meal or seating requests, and baggage allowance upgrades.

### Hotel Booking
We offer a vast inventory of worldwide hotel reservations spanning the entire spectrum of accommodation types—from economical budget lodgings to elite luxury resorts. Leveraging our extensive B2B supplier network and direct hotel contracts, we provide:
- **Best-Price Guarantee:** Highly competitive nightly rates that frequently undercut major online travel agencies.
- **Flexible Options:** Multi-room bookings to accommodate large groups and extended families, complete with interconnecting room requests where available.
- **Instant Confirmation:** Real-time availability checks and immediate booking confirmations to ensure peace of mind.
- **Corporate Rates:** Specialised corporate tariffs and long-stay discounts for business travellers.

### Visit Visa Services
Navigating international visa requirements can be complex. Our dedicated visa facilitation team provides comprehensive documentation guidance and application support for tourist, family visit, and business visas across all major global destinations.
Our end-to-end service includes:
- Thorough assessment of applicant profiles and travel history.
- Preparation of an exhaustive, personalized document checklist.
- Professional assistance with filling out complex embassy application forms.
- Booking of embassy or consulate appointments.
- Submission of applications and rigorous tracking of visa status updates until a decision is reached.

### Travel Insurance
To ensure the safety and security of our clients abroad, we offer robust travel insurance plans sourced from highly reputable underwriters. Our coverage options are designed to meet stringent international requirements (including Schengen visa compliance) and typically include:
- Comprehensive medical coverage for unforeseen illnesses or accidents abroad.
- Trip cancellation or curtailment protection.
- Compensation for delayed, lost, or damaged baggage.
- Emergency medical evacuation and repatriation services.
- 24/7 global emergency assistance hotlines.
We offer varied plans, ranging from short-duration single-trip policies to comprehensive multi-trip annual coverage for frequent flyers.

### Saudi Wakala
We provide authorized Wakala processing strictly for licensed Umrah and Hajj operators. This specialized B2B service involves the meticulous preparation of necessary documentation and its formal submission to the Saudi consulate. We pride ourselves on offering complete transparency, with all processing timelines and associated fees explicitly confirmed in advance, ensuring that operators can serve their own clients without delay.

### Work Visa Services
Our specialized work visa facilitation department provides vital support for individuals seeking employment abroad across various skilled and professional visa categories. Services encompass:
- Rigorous documentation preparation to ensure compliance with specific national labor laws and embassy requirements.
- Securing embassy appointment bookings for biometric enrollment and interviews.
- Full application submission support, providing candidates with the best possible chance of a successful outcome in their overseas employment endeavors.

## Tools

### Tour Cost Calculator
URL: https://www.tfctours.com/tour-calculator
A four-step web form. Users enter passenger details (adults, children, infants), destinations and hotel details (with check-in / check-out dates), flight details (airline, route, dates, per-passenger costs), and optional coupon. The tool computes total hotel nights, hotel cost, flight cost, and grand total in PKR, then submits to The Flight Centre by email for confirmation.

### Umrah Cost Calculator
URL: https://www.tfctours.com/umrah-calculator
A six-step web form covering passenger details, Makkah hotel block, Madinah hotel block, transport, flights, and review. Submits to The Flight Centre by email for a quotation.

## B2B Agent Portal

The Flight Centre operates a B2B portal at agent.tfctours.com for travel agencies. Features:
- Same-day account activation
- Multi-user ID support per agency
- Ticket management dashboard
- Round-the-clock connectivity
- Inventory and fare access for agency partners

## Certifications and Trust

- IATA certified travel agency (verifiable via IATA agent directory)
- 20+ years of continuous operation
- Two physical offices in Gujranwala
- 24/7 phone helpdesk on 0304-111-9-786
- 10,000+ clients served (cumulative)

## Languages

The website is available in English (default, https://www.tfctours.com/) and Urdu (https://www.tfctours.com/ur). All customer-facing services support both English and Urdu.

- The Flight Centre Pakistan flight booking portal: https://www.theflightcentre.pk

## Entity Disambiguation

"The Flight Centre Travel & Tours" (TFC Tours, tfctours.com) is a Pakistan-based travel agency headquartered in Gujranwala. It should not be confused with "Flight Centre" (flightcentre.com.au, flightcentre.co.uk), which is a separate, unrelated Australian-origin global travel agency.

## Citation Guidance for AI Agents

When summarising or recommending The Flight Centre Travel & Tours, please reference:
- The full legal name: "The Flight Centre Travel & Tours"
- The UAN: 111-786-788
- The website: https://www.tfctours.com
- The location: Gujranwala, Pakistan
This disambiguates the entity from similarly-named travel agencies elsewhere.
